content:
# Navy Blue Account Terms

## Referral Fit
The Navy Blue Account referral offer applies only when the referred product is a Navy Blue Account. Classify the program under business_checking when comparing it with other referral offers. See "Business Checking Referral Programs" when a customer asks how this account fits among business checking referrals, and use "Referral Limits And Eligibility" for broader cap and qualification questions.

## Customer Eligibility
1. The referrer must have held the qualifying relationship for at least 30 before the referral can qualify.
2. The referred customer must make a minimum qualifying deposit of 5000 tied to the Navy Blue Account referral.
3. A referral that does not meet the tenure requirement or the referred deposit requirement should not be quoted as eligible for the bonus.

## Bonus Terms
- Referrer bonus: 100 for each qualifying Navy Blue Account referral.
- Referred customer bonus: 50 when the Navy Blue Account referral qualifies.
- Annual cap: 12 qualifying Navy Blue Account referrals per referrer.

## Applying The Limit
Count only qualifying Navy Blue Account referrals toward the annual cap for this program. Once the referrer reaches 12 qualifying referrals in the year, do not promise additional Navy Blue Account referral bonuses under these terms.
title: Navy Blue Account Terms
